dvids.title: Forged by the Fight
dvids.desc:
Aviation Ordnanceman 1st Class Shanice Winston and Aviation Ordnanceman 3rd Class Joshua Underhill share their experience of working in Weapons Department on the world’s largest aircraft carrier, USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78).

(U.S. Navy Video by Mass Communication Specialist 3rd Class Brianna Barn
